title: Linting for Correctness, Safety, and Maintainability · Gate Lens: Rule Severity
summary: Configure a high-signal linter beyond default style warnings. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates rule severity increment in a risk-based lint policy and fixtures. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Set severity from failure impact and confidence rather than preference strength.
Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
